# Smart Estimate Creator (Uplizd) - Automate project scoping and win-rate optimization

## Summary
The Smart Estimate Creator is an intelligent Uplizd AI workflow that streamlines the project estimation process by synthesizing historical project data and current resource constraints. By leveraging the Composio Toolset to interface with Harvest, this solution empowers teams to generate accurate, data-driven quotes, reducing manual calculation errors and increasing pipeline velocity through automated scoping and margin analysis.

---
